name: thumbor
tagline: thumbor is a smart imaging service. It enables on-demand crop, resizing and flipping of images. It also features a VERY smart detection of important points in
description:
thumbor is a smart imaging service. It enables on-demand crop, resizing and flipping of images. It also features a VERY smart detection of important points in


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  thumbor:
    image: minimalcompact/thumbor:6.7.0
    volumes:
      - thumbor-data:/data
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      THUMBOR_PORT: '80'
    ports:
      - 42123:80
volumes:
  thumbor-data: null
